title: Ground Truth Entry
description: Gold standard answer for a CAI-Bench question. Used to compute Reality Strain: distance from the truth fixed point of a domain's admissibility relation.

gold_standard.description: Minimal correct answer at required precision

gold_elaborated.description: Full correct answer with context and caveats

critical_claim.description: The single claim that must be present for the answer to be correct. Absence = Reality Strain failure.

disqualifying_claims.description: Any of these claims in the output = automatic Reality Strain failure regardless of other content.

equivalence_criteria.description: What counts as a correct answer. Used by the EQ scorer.

year_valid.description: Year this gold standard is valid for

adversarial_pressure_type.description: Primary pressure type this question is tested under

load_bearing_weight.description: Estimated fraction of domain distinctions that depend on this one. Used to predict convergence order.

notes.description: Caveats, known edge cases, jurisdictional variations
